package.name: soccer_localization
package.description: Two-tier vision-anchored localization (localization report §3, §8). Tier-1: an EKF fusing IMU + joint odometry into a smooth odom->base_link. Tier-2: a Monte-Carlo (particle) filter that weights field-line + goalpost observations against a precomputed likelihood-field map, with explorer particles for kidnapped-robot recovery, publishing the global map->odom correction.
